programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una discrepancia en los restos de ADN al investigar el accidente de un avión militar que transportaba ataúdes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS sigue buscando a un marine desaparecido; Gibbs y Ziva viajan a Afganistán, último lugar conocido del marine. Mientras tanto, Tony revela sus mayores temores y Gibbs revive momentos de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Tony es encontrado dentro de un auto con un cuerpo sin vida en el maletero, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si es capaz de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Traición
programme.desc: Danny se une a la búsqueda de dos fugitivos, siendo uno de ellos alguien a quien ayudó a encarcelar injustamente. Gormley critica un plan de Trey Delgado, un sargento de la policía de Nueva York que, según el, está teniendo una aventura con su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Arizona a investigar una serie de crímenes metódicos ocurridos a mujeres, el final es desconcertante. Dentro del equipo también se vive incertidumbre porque Hotch puede ser el remplazo de Strauss quien murió en la temporada pasada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC sigue en Arizona investigando acerca de la vida familiar del sospechoso, el cual tenía un gemelo idéntico, pero la madre nunca se lo dijo a la policía.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un francotirador dispara en Dallas, la BAU investiga si el próximo aniversario del asesinato de Kennedy es un factor de motivación, pero descubrirán que en realidad va a matar la mujer de quien lo contrato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.desc: A family emergency forces Erin to rely on her team to prep for service.

programme.title: The Lost Kitchen
programme.desc: Erin and Michael celebrate their fourth wedding anniversary at the beach.

programme.title: The Lost Kitchen
programme.desc: Erin crafts a menu this week that says goodbye to summer and hello to fall.

programme.title: The Lost Kitchen
programme.desc: Erin returns to her roots as a simple cook for her first fall menu.

programme.title: The Lost Kitchen
programme.desc: Apple season inspires nostalgia and a dazzling menu of comforting dishes.

programme.title: The Lost Kitchen
programme.desc: Erin prepares a rich and decadent menu for the last dinner of the season.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: 10 años
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reencuentran en la reunión de alumnos de su secundaria. Cada uno tiene una historia increíble para contar.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Los tuyos, los míos, y los nuestros
programme.desc: Un almirante viudo de la Guardia costera y una viuda diseñadora de bolsos se enamoran y se casan, para la consternación de sus hijos, ocho de él y diez de ella.

programme.title: Legalmente rubia
programme.desc: Una chica hará cualquier cosa para conservar a su hombre. Aunque eso signifique ir… ¡A la Facultad de Derecho! Reese Witherspoon protagoniza con Luke Wilson, Selma Blair y Victor Garber una comedia con corazón de oro, ¡y un cabello que hace juego!

programme.title: Legalmente rubia 2: Más rubia que nunca
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon está de vuelta en la piel de Elle Woods y esta vez enfrentará a Washington D. C. Con un elenco de estrellas, que incluye a Sally Field, Bob Newhart y Luke Wilson, esta divertida comedia de éxito te dejará pidiendo más.

programme.title: Viento negro
programme.desc: Un hombre recientemente separado de su esposa está a cargo de establecer una nueva vida a través del desierto en condiciones difíciles. Las cosas se complican aún más cuando su hijo 'protegido' llega con ganas de conectarse

programme.title: La noche del halcón
programme.desc: En una acogedora y espléndida escenografía del campo mexicano, un rudo pistolero retirado tiene problemas con su ahijado cuando este se enamora de la misma mujer que él ama.

programme.title: Canción del alma
programme.desc: María fue una gran estrella del canto que perdió todo su dinero entre su exmarido y en pagar la matrícula de la escuela de su hija. ¿Comprenderá alguna vez la hija el sacrificio de su madre?

programme.title: Crónica de un Cobarde
programme.desc: Juan, casado con María y dueño del rancho La Troja, es asaltado y rescatado por Tomás. Al regresar, descubre que su padre ha sido asesinado por un forastero. Decidido a vengarlo, sigue la pista dejada: una espuela que pertenece a Tomás.

programme.title: Viento negro
programme.desc: Un hombre recientemente separado de su esposa está a cargo de establecer una nueva vida a través del desierto en condiciones difíciles. Las cosas se complican aún más cuando su hijo 'protegido' llega con ganas de conectarse

programme.title: Inmaculada
programme.desc: Una mujer cuya hija está a punto de lanzar su vida por el bien de un canalla. La mujer toma a su hija a un lado y le ruega que no cometa ese desastroso error. Para reforzar su argumento, nos cuenta su propia desgracia.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Al calor de las armas
programme.desc: Dos criminales secuestran a la mujer equivocada.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: Luna de porcelana
programme.desc: Un apasionado thriller de suspenso sobre un detective veterano en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, cuyo romance clandestino con una viuda joven y rica teje una telaraña de engaño, traición y asesinato.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Doble traición
programme.desc: Una semana antes de Navidad, y después de pasar seis años en prisión, un expresidiario se ve obligado a participar en un atraco al casino.

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: Adiós Las Vegas
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage ganó un Oscar® al Mejor Actor por su interpretación inquietante de un alcohólico suicida que se enamora de una compasiva prostituta de Las Vegas (Elisabeth Shue) en una de las películas más aclamadas por la crítica en el 1995.

programme.title: Al calor de la noche
programme.desc: Un policía afroamericano tiene que investigar el caso de un asesinato por motivos raciales en una hostil ciudad sureña.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: El pacificador
programme.desc: Cuando un tren que transporta ojivas nucleares se estrella en la Unión Soviética, la especialista nuclear Dra. Kelly descubre que el accidente es en realidad parte de un complot para cubrir el robo de las armas.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Máxima venganza
programme.desc: En la línea de TRAINING DAY, STREET KINGS y AMERICAN GANGSTER, Curtis 50 CENT Jackson, Val Kilmer y Vinnie Jones protagonizan una nueva película de acción llena de venganza entre policías buenos y malos.

programme.title: Respeto (2012)
programme.desc: Lucas comienza un romance con Jasmine sin saber que antes anduvo con Jacob, uno de sus amigos. Tras sentirse traicionado, Jacob delata a Lucas con el hermanastro de Jasmine y solo provoca la ira entre pandillas.

programme.title: En el infierno
programme.desc: Dentro de la prisión más corrupta de Europa del este, el alcaide pone a los prisioneros unos contra otros en peleas hasta la muerte.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutrón: El niño genio
programme.desc: Durante la noche, los extraterrestres llegan a la tierra en sus naves espaciales y secuestran a todos los padres del pueblo de Jimmy, Retroville. Jimmy debe rescatar a los padres secuestrados.

programme.title: Un amable fantasma
programme.desc: La historia, basada en el cuento de Hans Christian Andersen El polvorín. Voita adquiere un polvorín de oro con el que puede conjurar al fantasma y pedirle que cumpla tres deseos.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Jefe de estado
programme.desc: Cuando Washington necesita desesperadamente un candidato presidencial que sea garantía de perder las elecciones, escogen a Mayes Gilliam (Chris Rock), un desconocido político local de barrio, para que sea su títere.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio
programme.desc: Momentos divertidos al lado de los talentosos Miguel Céspedes y Raymond Pozo, con más de 600 programas de televisión producidos y viendo la sonrisa de la gente de manera directa en los espectáculos que han realizado en vivo.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El torpe Inspector Clouseau (Steve Martin) se encarga de investigar el asesinato de un famoso entrenador de fútbol y el robo del diamante Pantera Rosa, de inestimable valor. Él y su compañero Gilbert Ponton (Jean Reno) van de calamidad en calamidad.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: Una despreocupada mujer mayor descubre algo inesperado después de una breve aventura con un oficial naval retirado que conoció en un club nocturno.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: Marcelino
programme.desc: Marcelino es un niño abandonado criado en un monasterio. El niño tiene un amigo a quien le comparte todos los días pan y vino, un día, un grupo de soldados atacan por sorpresa al campamento, e intentan llevarse a Marcelino.

programme.title: Estación zombi
programme.desc: Una desgarradora película de terror y suspenso zombi, que sigue a un grupo de pasajeros aterrorizados que se abren camino a través de un brote viral en todo el país.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Negra Navidad
programme.desc: Una reversión escalofriante de la clásica película de terror. Un maníaco fugitivo aterroriza a las jóvenes de una fraternidad en su propia casa en Nochebuena. ¿Quién sobrevivirá a la noche?

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Open Water (2004) (LAS)
programme.desc: A couple are left stranded in shark infested waters while on vacation.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: The Last Round-Up
programme.desc: Gene Autry is a cattle rancher determined to protect the interests of neighboring ranchers and Indians against unscrupulous land manipulators when local authorities plan to build an aqueduct.

programme.title: Trail To San Antone
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to help a young jockey get back on track after an “accident” arranged by a horse trainer ruins his career. Action-packed adventure with fantastic stunts, and Gene Autry's Champion.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: Birdman of Alcatraz
programme.desc: Burt Lancaster stars in the true story of killer Robert Stroud, who spent 43 years in solitary confinement at Alcatraz, and who educated himself, becoming a world renowned authority on birds. Thelma Ritter, Telly Savalas and Karl Malden co-star.

programme.title: X: The Man With The X-Ray Eyes
programme.desc: Ray Milland stars as a brilliant scientist who tests a formula for x-ray vision on himself and discovers that his ability to see through walls, clothing, and flesh is eclipsed by an insatiable desire to see more than any mortal can possibly bear!

programme.title: Danger Diabolik
programme.desc: The suave thief called Diabolik can’t get enough of life’s good – or glittery – things. Not when there are currency shipments to steal from under the noses of government officials and priceless jewels to lift from the boudoirs of the rich.

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1935)
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring which is trying to steal top secret information.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson. While befriending the little girl, Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog, leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out $41.75 in coins, Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it, but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude feels the romance has gone out of her marriage; her problem now is convince Walter to do something about it. Maude's sure a weekend with Walter at a mountain cabin would be the perfect setting to rekindle their fire.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's mother pays a rare visit, transforming Maude into a quivering mass of guilt and insecurity. Wanting her mother to approve of Walter, whom she has never met, Maude over-reacts, putting the entire household into a state of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude breaks the news that she's been asked to run for the State Senate, everyone is happy and proud, but Walter, who fears her political life would ruin their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude decides to run for the State Senate, Walter decides to run to the nearest swinging-singles bachelor pad -- it looks like Maude may have struck out for the fourth time in the marital sweepstakes.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Walter's separation is on a collision course as each shows up at the Harmons' anniversary party with a 'date.' Broadway musical-comedy star Bernadette Peters guest stars as Kathy Rivers, Walter's date for the party.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner goes to Los Angeles to take custody of a suspected arsonist and bring him back to Sparta, but the arsonist disappears and is later found murdered. A pretty insurance fraud investigator helps Bubba uncover the truth behind the murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Vic Glendon, the ex-husband of Sparta councilperson Harriet DeLong, has been charged with murder and is facing a death sentence. Harriet's teenage son, Eugene, is most affected by the trial and the conflict he feels towards his criminal father.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A double murder at a local roadhouse is the focus of the Sparta police, and a young witness is reluctant to come forward. Now that they are parents, Althea Tibbs worries about Virgil’s safety on the police force and asks him to consider law school.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: An old flame of Gillespie’s reappears in Sparta to ask him for some professional help in assuring that her land is willed directly to her daughter, the product of the affair that she and Gillespie had twenty years ago. Stella Stevens guest stars.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Jeanette Marshall is a teacher in Sparta who has eye for the gentlemen, but her multiple romances attract negative attention from the townsfolk, and eccentric Ashe Crowe makes it his mission to put a permanent stop to Jeanette's flirtatious ways.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Bianca is stoked when Katie agrees to help her with her university applications…until she suspects her new “friend” is using her to source painkillers. As Katie’s downward spiral continues, Bianca and Drew become closer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona and Imogen scheme to end Marisol’s Student Council reign. The plan? Throw an unforgettable end-of-semester Degrassi holiday carnival. But with a huge family crisis looming, Fiona worries she may have over-promised.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona and Imogen scheme to end Marisol’s Student Council reign. The plan? Throw an unforgettable end-of-semester Degrassi holiday carnival. But with a huge family crisis looming, Fiona worries she may have over-promised.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Degrassi students head back to class, Drew decides the time is right to break up with Katie. Clare returns from the break excited to reconnect with Eli, but does he feel the same way?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After blacking out, Drew tries to piece together what happened at the party. Clare's new internship means she has less time for Eli, but they can still make it work… right? Maya embarrasses herself at a band audition.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Katie's anger at Drew boils over, she searches for a way to make him suffer. Eli clashes with Becky while planning Degrassi's next play. Meanwhile, a new guy catches Tristan's eye.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew feels like his life is falling apart. Is he upset about losing Bianca, or is something bigger going on? While casting the play, Eli and Becky work to resolve their creative differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig tries to hide the fact that he's poor from Tori. When Eli shares his vision for the musical, Dave isn’t sure he has what it takes to play Romeo. Fiona returns to Degrassi, thrilled to see her girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig will do anything to impress Tori… even steal. Fiona wants Imogen to define their relationship: Are they a couple or not? The hockey team teases Dave about his role in the play.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Alli is offered a scholarship to MIT, her parents are bursting with pride -- but is it the right choice? Meanwhile, Jake decides college isn't for him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli makes a difficult choice about her future. With a little help from Katie, Jake tries to prove himself to his father. Cam snaps at Maya before a big game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna bonds with Becky -- and Becky's hot brother, Luke -- but will religious differences come between them? Clare obsesses over her journalism mentor, Asher. Drew is offered a job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jenna gets baptized, but did she do it for the wrong reasons? Drew is failing his classes, and considers dropping out of Degrassi. Connor's tweets embarrass Clare in front of Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to impress Asher by pitching a story about Romeo and Jules. K.C. and Bianca play matchmaker for K.C.'s mom. Katie chaperones Maya's date with Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A secret is eating away at Clare, but will facing the truth make things worse for her? K.C.'s mom has some surprising news. Meanwhile, Maya tries to impress Cam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam needs a break from hockey, so he blows off practice to hang out with Maya. K.C.'s dad is release from jail, but is he ready to have him back in the picture? Fiona's loft is a disaster, and she blames her new roommate -- Drew.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cam struggles to live up to everyone's expectations on the ice. K.C. wants his dad out of his life -- even if it means doing something drastic. Drew and Fiona try to work out their differences.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen designs an elaborate set for Romeo and Jules, and reaches out to her estranged mother for the money to build it. Meanwhile, Becky interferes with ticket sales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Imogen worries about her dad's strange behavior. Becky bonds with Adam without realizing that he's transgender. Katie and Jake realize they have feelings for each other -- but where does that leave Mike Dallas?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare writes an article that stirs up trouble at school and makes her a new enemy -- Mike Dallas. Tori, Tristan, and Dave compete in a talent contest. Drew feels distant from Bianca, so he goes on a spending spree.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eli organizes a surprise birthday party to cheer Clare up, and starts to suspect that she's hiding something. Audra urges Drew to go back to Degrassi. Dave worries that he and Alli are growing apart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky doesn't want to keep Adam a secret, so she decides to tell her parents that he's transgender.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is not feeling very good about herself, so she lets Tori give her a pageant-style makeover.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons who are in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the paparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning he is not her true father, Fallon refuses to see Blake; Jeff falls in love with Claudia, who is caught stealing from Denver-Carrington; Fallon's baby undergoes emergency surgery; Claudia's husband and daughter are believed dead.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A blood test proves that Blake is Fallon's true father; Steven travels to Hollywood in search of his wife; Claudia learns her husband and daughter are believed to be dead; as Krystle struggles with an armed Claudia, the gun discharges.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia is hospitalized after the shooting incident; Krystle is implicated. Logan Rhinewood continues to amass Devner-Carrington; Cecil proposes marriage to Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia remains confused following the accident; Jeff urges Fallon to reconcile; Steven is blackmailed by a young drifter.

programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels y aprende sobre sus amigos los animales en esta emocionante aventura que seguro les arrancará muchas sonrisas a los más pequeños.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Los influencers llegan a la Villa y lo que promete ser el momento ideal para comenzar las vacaciones, se ve interrumpido por la Tablet del Terror.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana amenaza a Frida tras su nuevo romance con Brandon. La Sala Tornado abre sus puertas y eligen a ciegas quién es el próximo EX en llegar. Suavecito sufre por el romance de Kim e Ian.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Celos, arena y mar!

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: La manada más salvaje

programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.
